title: Bioclimatic variables influence the strength of purifying selection on mitochondrial DNA in an avian clade (Aves: Piciformes)
author: FUCHS, Jerome
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The enclosed data set allow the replication of the analyses performed in 'Bioclimatic variables influence the strength of purifying selection on mitochondrial DNA in an avian clade (Aves: Piciformes)' including, bioclimatic extraction from occurrence data ( Figure 1 Bioclimatic data and PCA.zip ) , the phylogenetic reconstruction ( Figure 2 Phylogeny.zip ), the inference of population size history from a diploid sequence using the Pairwise Sequentially Markovian Coalescent (PSMC) model ( PSMC.zip ) as well as selection regimes analyses using discrete (PAML.zip) or continuous (coevol.zip) variables.
steps_raw: The enclosed data set allow the replication of the analyses performed in 'Bioclimatic variables influence the strength of purifying selection on mitochondrial DNA in an avian clade (Aves: Piciformes)' including, bioclimatic extraction from occurrence data ( Figure 1 Bioclimatic data and PCA.zip ) , the phylogenetic reconstruction ( Figure 2 Phylogeny.zip ), the inference of population size history from a diploid sequence using the Pairwise Sequentially Markovian Coalescent (PSMC) model ( PSMC.zip ) as well as selection regimes analyses using discrete (PAML.zip) or continuous (coevol.zip) variables.
